name: Hotel in Remote Area
userQuery: we're a hotel in a remote area
reasoning: Context: Hospitality industry + 'remote area' → likely no fiber available
Solution: 'Satellite' (only option for remote locations) → Starlink products
Additional need: Hotels need guest Wi-Fi → 'Managed Services' → Managed Wi-Fi
Why: Starlink Enterprise Kit works in remote areas, pairs with Managed Wi-Fi for guest experience

recommendedItems.name: Starlink Enterprise Kit
recommendedItems.reason: Best solution for remote hotels - provides reliable high-speed internet where traditional fiber isn't available. Works for guest Wi-Fi, booking systems, and POS.

recommendedItems.name: Managed Wi-Fi: Premium Package
recommendedItems.reason: Pairs perfectly with Starlink to provide seamless guest connectivity across your property. Premium package suits hospitality standards.

output.reply: For a remote hotel location, I recommend **Starlink Enterprise Kit** for reliable internet where traditional fiber isn't available. Pair it with our **Managed Wi-Fi Premium Package** to provide seamless guest connectivity. What's your hotel size (number of rooms) so I can refine the recommendation?

metadata.notes: Classic remote location example with satellite solution
